channel.title: Anomaly Detection on Franz Louis Cesista
channel.description: Recent content in Anomaly Detection on Franz Louis Cesista

item.title: Codewars 2017
item.description: A particle swarm-based AI built to beat other AIs in a Command-and-Conquer-esque game. It managed to get to the finals of the Russian AI Cup 2017.

item.title: Booking Demand Prediction for Grab SEA
item.description: Booking demand prediction for Grab's Southeast Asia operations. The project involves spatio-temporal forecasting, anomaly detection, and econometric modeling.
